channel.title: note on PineHat's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in note on PineHat's Blog

item.title: Hugo in Org-Mode
item.description: If you want to use hugo and work in org-mode, Follow the doc. Hugo + Org-Mode? sudo apt install emacs hugo -y # Erro will appeal while you run this command in Ubuntu, you would # better check your repo and run it again. Org-Mode Config init-org-hugo.el would be like: ;;; init-org-hugo.el --- Configure org-mode-ox-hugo global behaviour -*- lexical-binding: t -*- ;;; Commentary: ;;; Code: (require-package 'ox-hugo) (with-eval-after-load 'ox (require 'ox-hugo)) (provide 'init-org-hugo) ;;; init-org-hugo.
